Text.Page:
We just need to get through to Maon's Cabin. The only thing in our way is those {@LinkCreature:2#4#slinking sabertooths}.

They were afraid of humans before, but now they hunt everything on sight.

Kill those beasts and bring their teeth to Reindal. He has a thing for teeth. I didn't ask what he does with them.
Do you see those sabertooths? Those teeth are just...they're lovely.
